free_text: Excitation functions for production of 88Zr and 88Y by
proton and deuteron irradiation of Mo, Nb, Zr and Y
Natural metal foils of Mo, Nb, Zr, Y
Standard stacked foil irradiation method was used.
Each stack contained other high purity metallic foils
such as Al, Ti, Fe, Ni, Cu, Zn, W.
Irradiations were done with low intensity external
beams of the cyclotrons <200 nA, irradiation times
